title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
